title: Rich Roasted Slovakian Mushroom Casserole
description: A hearty and flavorful Slovakian dish featuring roasted mushrooms and a creamy yeast-based sauce, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This plant-based friendly recipe is roasted to perfection in an agave leaf vessel.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the yeast, vegetable broth, soy cream, agave nectar, salt, black pepper, paprika, and garlic powder.
Add the sliced mushrooms to the bowl and toss to coat with the yeast mixture.
Spoon the mushroom mixture into an agave leaf vessel.
Roast the casserole in the preheated oven for 30 minutes.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the casserole hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
